ideas.title: Cold Email Reply Network (Inbox Engagement Service)
ideas.description: A service where subscribers connect their inbox. When cold emails arrive, the service auto-opens and replies with genuine, contextual AI-generated messages — boosting the sender reply rate and improving their deliverability scores. Cold email senders pay to have their emails engaged with by real inboxes.
ideas.manualSteps: Acquire subscribers (inbox owners) and cold email senders. Handle Gmail/Outlook OAuth approvals.
ideas.notes: Two-sided marketplace: inbox owners (passive earners) + cold email senders (paying customers). The reply content must look authentic — use Claude to write contextual responses based on email subject/body. Revenue: charge senders per-reply or subscription. Watch Gmail/Outlook ToS on automation.
ideas.instructionsForClaude:
1. Build inbox subscriber side: Gmail/Outlook OAuth connect, watch for incoming cold emails (filter by patterns), auto-open + generate reply via Claude, send reply
2. Build sender side: submit domains/sending addresses, track open/reply rates per campaign
3. Billing: charge senders $0.10-0.50 per reply, or $99-299/mo subscription
4. Dashboard at /app/inbox-reply-network: subscriber count, replies sent, revenue, sender campaigns
5. Quality controls: vary reply delay (5min-4hrs), vary reply length/tone, avoid spam flags

ideas.title: AI UGC Video Factory for TikTok Shop
ideas.description: Use AI tools (ArcAds, Kling, Claude) to mass-produce UGC-style product review videos for TikTok Shop affiliate marketing. Instead of hiring influencers at $200-500/video, generate AI avatar videos at ~$0.50/each. Post across multiple creator-style accounts linking to affiliate products. Noah Frydberg claims this workflow replaced a $500K/year content team with $300/month in AI tools, producing 550+ videos per day.
ideas.manualSteps: Create TikTok Shop seller/affiliate account, select product niche, set up ArcAds account, seed initial product inventory or go affiliate-only
ideas.source: instagram-reel
ideas.notes: Source: Noah Frydberg (@noahhfrydberg), verified creator with 10K followers, runs Maverick Creative (TikTok Shop agency). PROS: Extremely low cost per video vs human creators, massive volume advantage, TikTok Shop is still growing fast, affiliate model means no inventory risk. CONS: AI-generated content may trigger platform detection/bans, TikTok Shop policies may change, market getting saturated as more people learn this, quality of AI avatars still uncanny to some viewers, relies heavily on TikTok algorithm. RISKS: Platform risk (TikTok bans in some countries), AI detection crackdowns, FTC disclosure requirements for affiliate content. VERDICT: Worth researching more - the affiliate-only model (no inventory) is low-risk. Start with 1 product niche, test 50 AI videos, measure conversion before scaling.
ideas.instructionsForClaude:
1. Research TikTok Shop affiliate program requirements and sign up
2. Research ArcAds pricing, features, and API access
3. Pick a product niche (beauty, health supplements, kitchen gadgets are top performers)
4. Build a pipeline:
   - Use Claude to generate video scripts based on competitor analysis
   - Feed scripts to ArcAds to generate AI avatar videos
   - Auto-upload to TikTok with product links
5. Start with 10-20 videos/day in one niche, track metrics
6. If conversion rate > 1%, scale to 100+ videos/day across multiple niches
7. Build Mission Control dashboard to track: videos posted, views, clicks, conversions, revenue per video
8. Key tools: ArcAds (AI avatars), Claude (scripts), CapCut (editing), TikTok Shop affiliate dashboard

ideas.title: Polymarket Trading & Arbitrage Bot
ideas.description: Track the top 20 Polymarket whale wallets, analyze their trading patterns, and automatically mirror their positions with configurable risk limits. Whales have better information - piggyback on their research. Develop an automated arbitrage bot for Polymarket that exploits pricing inefficiencies when combined 'Yes' and 'No' contract prices dip below $1. Focuses on low-risk, guaranteed profit opportunities.
ideas.manualSteps: Set up Polymarket account, deposit initial capital ($200-500), approve API access
ideas.source: claude-generated
ideas.notes:
Key risk: whales can have losing streaks. Need position sizing limits (max 5% per trade). Start with paper trading to validate strategy. Polymarket API is public and well-documented.
Merged: whale copy-trading + arbitrage strategies
ideas.instructionsForClaude:
1. Research Polymarket API docs. Build a Python script that:
   - Identifies top 20 whale wallets by total volume (use public leaderboard data)
   - Monitors their new positions in real-time via websocket/polling
   - Logs all whale trades to a local SQLite DB
2. Build a copy-trading engine:
   - When a whale opens a position > $1000, mirror it at configurable % (default 2% of bankroll)
   - Implement position sizing: max 5% per trade, max 20% total exposure
   - Paper-trade mode first (log what WOULD have happened)
3. Build Mission Control dashboard page at /app/polymarket-whales:
   - Show whale leaderboard with P&L, win rate, avg position size
   - Live feed of whale trades with copy status
   - Portfolio view: current positions, unrealized P&L, total return
   - Toggle: paper-trade vs live mode
4. Set up cron job: poll whale positions every 5 minutes
5. Register in cron/jobs.json and create launchd plist
6. Send Telegram alert on each copied trade with details
